race.description: Picklebet Get Your Pickle On Hcp
race.comment: DIAMANTINA ROSE (3) is back from a three months spell and she does run well first-up, including a win over 860m at Gatton at the start of last prep. Fitter for a recent trial win at Toowoomba Inner Track and is expected to go very well. MISTER TUDOR (4) is on a quick turnaround after a solid third over 870m at Toowoomba five days ago. Has a wide gate to overcome but will be hard to beat. JADA ROSE (7) impressed when successful on debut over 800m at Ipswich three weeks ago. Has upside and is well placed to feature again. BAD FOREST (2) is putting together some solid results. Finished third at Gatton two starts back then scored by 3.5 lengths last time out over 1021m at Murwillumbah. Looks well placed so expect another big run.
